title: This NotebookLM feature cuts my workload by 50%
summary: NotebookLM's mind map feature automatically organizes uploaded sources into a hierarchical visual structure of topics and subtopics, enabling users to selectively focus on relevant content sections without reading all source material. This capability reduces workload by filtering information based on audience needs.
